title: Auth consolidation: cookie signing, RESTART_PASSWORD fix, allowlist

log.context: Auth consolidation: cookie signing, RESTART_PASSWORD fix, allowlist

All done. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

---

**Security fixes deployed atomically — all three services running.**

**Fix 1: HMAC cookie signing**
- Added `_sign_cookie` / `_verify_cookie` helpers (HMAC-SHA256, `username.hex_sig` format) to all three services
- `/mnt/data/terminal/server.py`: signs cookie at OAuth callback, verifies in `_is_authed`
- `/mnt/data/temporal/proxy.py`: verifies signature in `_is_authed`
